queue.title: Add tests for critical-path providers (state.js, credentials.js, services.js)
queue.description: d071-baseline.json shows 7/12 providers untested. Start with the 3 most critical: state.js (persistence layer), credentials.js (auth), services.js (service registry). These are critical-path files that directly affect session reliability.

queue.title: Stale-ref-check: add inline-code exclusion for markdown
queue.description: (added ~s1662): `stale-ref-check.sh` treats markdown inline code (`backtick-quoted`) refs as structural. Historical notes like "was `old-hook.sh`" trigger false positives. Adding a regex filter for `was \`...\`` or strikethrough `~~..~~` patterns in the markdown structural-ref check would reduce noise during d070 cleanup.

queue.title: Manifest reconciliation in post-hook regression test
queue.description: (added ~s1664): B#495 found 7 stale manifest entries and 3 missing entries from prior consolidations (wq-739, wq-744). The `hook-integration.test.mjs` NETWORK_HOOKS set also drifts. Add a test case that cross-checks manifest.json entries against actual files on disk — flag missing files and unlisted hooks. Prevents silent manifest drift after each consolidation.

queue.title: Add anti-stall rule to SESSION_ENGAGE.md and SESSION_AUDIT.md
queue.description: R#298 added the anti-stall rule to SESSION_REFLECT.md (matching SESSION_BUILD.md from wq-766). SESSION_ENGAGE.md and SESSION_AUDIT.md still lack it. The -p mode termination risk applies equally to all session types. Copy the proven rule text to both files.

queue.title: Extend api.test.mjs state isolation to inbox.json and deprecations.json
queue.description: (added ~s1673): wq-762 added backup/restore for human-review.json, but api.test.mjs also POSTs test data to /inbox, /deprecations, /snapshots, /directory, /paste, /kv, and /polls endpoints. Inbox has a post-test filter cleanup but others don't. Extending STATE_FILES_TO_ISOLATE to cover inbox.json and deprecations.json prevents test-data pollution.

queue.title: Integrate engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs into E session pre-hook
queue.description: (added ~s1689): engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs detects platform concentration in E sessions but isn't wired into any hook. Add a call in 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh with --json --alert-file to automatically surface diversity warnings before each E session, preventing concentration drift proactively.
